name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual report generation causes late financial insights. We automate report generation instead of manual report creation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient report generation from raw accounting data

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient report generation from raw accounting data
